query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS financial_settings (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (UUID()),
  withdrawals_enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  withdrawal_minimum DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 50.00,
  withdrawal_commission_percent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10.00,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW(),
  updated_by INT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT withdrawal_minimum_positive CHECK (withdrawal_minimum > 0),
  CONSTRAINT commission_valid CHECK (withdrawal_commission_percent >= 0 AND withdrawal_commission_percent <= 100)
);

INSERT INTO financial_settings (id, withdrawals_enabled, withdrawal_minimum, withdrawal_commission_percent)
SELECT UUID(), FALSE, 50.00, 10.00
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM financial_settings LIMIT 1);
